_description: Per-scenario episode configuration for curriculum training T1→T4.
Tier multipliers account for overlay difficulty scaling:
medium & medium-multi-site: base SR=0.0 at 3000 eps standalone.
With T1 overlay (prob=0.99), topology is preserved but exploits trivialised
→ agent only needs to learn routing/path. Estimated 5000 base eps.
Curriculum transfer should reduce higher-tier requirements vs standalone.
